assertion_results.text: Branch name is lowercase with hyphens, no spaces (e.g., fix-auth-timeout-test)
assertion_results.evidence: Without the skill, Claude has no instruction to derive a branch name. It would likely ask the user or skip this step entirely.

assertion_results.text: Model selected is sonnet (default for straightforward bug fix)
assertion_results.evidence: Without the skill, there is no model selection guidance. Claude wouldn't know to choose between sonnet and opus.

assertion_results.text: setup-worktree.sh is called with the branch name
assertion_results.evidence: Without the skill, Claude doesn't know setup-worktree.sh exists or how to call it.

assertion_results.text: Write tool is used to create the prompt file (not write-prompt.sh via Bash)
assertion_results.evidence: Without the skill, Claude has no concept of a prompt file workflow.
No guidance on file naming convention without the skill.
Without the skill, Claude doesn't know about spawn-tmux.sh.

assertion_results.text: spawn-tmux.sh receives --prompt with an absolute path to the prompt file
assertion_results.evidence: No knowledge of the spawn-tmux.sh interface without the skill.

assertion_results.text: Confirmation message includes how to switch to the tmux window
assertion_results.evidence: Without the skill, Claude wouldn't know to provide tmux switch instructions.
